title: oxalis helicoides
intro: Oxalis helicoides, also known as the love plant or purple oxalis, is a flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae) that is native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxalis helicoides include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Oxalis helicoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
